text:
There once was an old man. Everything about him smelled old. Even his clothes were like old library books. He liked them. He had a big garden. He filled it with great old things. One year the fox raided his garden. Everything got murdered.

Oh oh oh. That's bad.

He went to the big city. He bought a fancy house. He started taking nice pictures. Just old things.


How could they afford the fancy place?


Oh?


That's nice. I guess that's better.


Do you think...?


They probably live happy lives.


Yeah?


What would they do?


Oh oh oh. that.







They think they're brave.


They think they're wise.



Well you know who knows.

That old man.


You old thing.

I think....



They think they'll find true happiness.



I think they will.


You're right.





Yes.





Oh oh oh.




That would be funny.





Oh oh oh.




They weren’t.

That old man...

They liked him
